title: Notion CRM & Sales Pipeline Template
description:
Stop losing deals in spreadsheets and sticky notes. This all-in-one Notion CRM gives freelancers, sales reps, and small business owners a clean, structured workspace to manage every stage of the sales process — from first contact to closed deal and collected payment.

Track leads, companies, and deals in a visual Kanban pipeline. Log every call, email, and meeting in a linked activity log. Never miss a follow-up with a built-in task manager that surfaces what needs your attention today. Forecast revenue with weighted deal values calculated automatically by formula. And when a deal closes, the Revenue Tracker keeps invoices and payments organized in one place.

With 6 interconnected databases, a central dashboard, and over 25 pre-built views — including Hot Leads, Stale Deals, Closing This Month, and Top Accounts — this template gives you instant visibility into your pipeline health without the complexity or cost of traditional CRM software. Duplicate it into your Notion workspace and start closing deals with confidence.
features: Visual Kanban Pipeline with 6 deal stages (Lead → Closed Won) so you can see your entire sales funnel at a glance and move deals forward with a drag and drop.
Automatic Weighted Revenue Forecasting uses a built-in formula (Deal Value × Win Probability) so you always know your realistic projected income for the month.
Linked Activity Log captures every call, email, meeting, and demo against the right contact and deal, giving you a complete relationship history with zero manual cross-referencing.
Built-in Task & Follow-Up Manager with priority flags, due dates, and deal context ensures no prospect is ever forgotten and no commitment falls through the cracks.
Revenue Tracker database monitors invoiced amounts, payments received, and outstanding balances so your sales process connects directly to your cash flow in one workspace.

faq.q: Do I need a paid Notion plan to use this template?
faq.a: The template works on Notion's free plan for individual use. If you want to share it with teammates and use multi-member features like the 'Owner' and 'Assigned To' person fields, you will need Notion's Plus or Business plan. Solo users can get full value on the free tier.

faq.q: Is this template suitable for a team, or is it designed for solo users only?
faq.a: It is built to work for both. Solo consultants and freelancers can use it as a personal pipeline tracker, while small sales teams can share the workspace, assign deals and tasks to specific reps, and get a unified view of the full pipeline. All databases include an Owner or Assigned To field for team accountability.

faq.q: How do I get started after purchasing?
faq.a: After completing your purchase you will receive a Notion template link. Click the link, hit 'Duplicate' in the top-right corner of the page, and the entire template — all 6 databases, the dashboard, and every pre-built view — will be copied instantly into your Notion workspace. A short setup guide inside the template walks you through customizing it for your business in under 15 minutes.
